response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified first song 'Otana Furi Shite' from the text '大人なフリして。' in the top-left corner. Search query: '"大人なフリして" Japanese and English lyrics'. 2. Identified second song 'chocolate box' from the on-screen text 'chocolate box' at the bottom-center. Search query: '"chocolate box" dezzy Japanese and English lyrics'. Both songs confirmed as popular Vocaloid/J-pop tracks. Lyrics were not fully extracted from search snippets, placeholders used as per system constraints for this specific task.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Yuzuki Choco and Yozora Mel (Hololive) at the 'Yuzuki Choco Seitansai 2026' event. The performance includes 'Otana Furi Shite' (originally by Suisougurashi) and 'chocolate box' (originally by dezzy).

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco and Yozora Mel performing 'Otana Furi Shite' on stage. Title appears in the top-left corner.
Yuzuki Choco and Yozora Mel performing 'chocolate box'. Title and credits appear at the bottom center of the screen.
